title: eria suborbicularis
intro: Eria suborbicularis is a type of flowering orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in countries such as India and Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. Studies have shown that Eria suborbicularis possesses anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health issues.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", eria suborbicularis has anti-inflammatory, anti-respiratory syncytial virus (RSV), and neuroprotective properties.
